```python
entrada_texto.pack(pady=10)

# Iniciar el bucle principal de la aplicación

```

Este script crea una ventana con un área de texto y un botón. Cuando el usuario hace clic en el botón "Guardar Texto", el texto introducido en el área de texto se guarda en un archivo llamado `texto_guardado.txt`.

Sure, here's a simple Python script using the BeautifulSoup library to scrape a website for harmful chemicals used in industrial applications. This script will search for a specific keyword on a given website and print out any relevant information it finds.

```python
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

# Define the URL of the website to scrape
url = 'https://www.example.com'

# Send a GET request to the website
response = requests.get(url)

# Parse the HTML content of the website
soup = BeautifulSoup(response.content, 'html.parser')

# Define the keyword to search for
keyword = 'harmful chemicals'

# Find all instances of the keyword on the website
results = soup.find_all(text=lambda text: text and keyword in text.lower())

# Print out the relevant information
for result in results:
    print(result.strip())
```

Please note that this script is a basic example and may not work perfectly for all websites. You may need to modify the script to suit your specific needs.
